response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years across web, embedded, mobile, and distributed systems — dramatically overqualified for a Junior/Mid-Level role. While the technical skill overlap is real (TypeScript, React, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, REST APIs, TDD, LLM/agentic tooling), the seniority mismatch creates serious retention risk and likely a wide compensation gap. PostgreSQL is not demonstrated; MongoDB and general SQL appear instead. Nest.js is absent from the resume. Hiring this candidate into an entry-level IC role would almost certainly result in early attrition.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack background with React, Node.js, and REST API experience directly matching core required skills
Demonstrated AI/LLM integration experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) covers multiple nice-to-have qualifications
Berlin-based with a consistent track record of TDD, clean architecture, and team collaboration across many roles
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level engineer with 15+ years applying for an entry-level position creates a near-certain attrition and salary-expectation mismatch
No PostgreSQL experience evident — primary database exposure is MongoDB and unspecified SQL, not the preferred relational stack
No Nest.js mentioned anywhere in the resume, which is one of the two core framework requirements
